surfaces.name: diagnostic_target
surfaces.primary_question: What exact runtime target is being diagnosed before any judgment?

surfaces.name: diagnostic_session
surfaces.primary_question: What normalized runtime diagnosis was actually observed on this pass?

surfaces.name: diagnosis_companion
surfaces.primary_question: How should symptom, probable cause, and owner hints stay review-shaped before repair?

surfaces.name: reviewed_diagnosis_ref
surfaces.primary_question: Has the current runtime-local diagnosis been reviewed enough to support repair handoff?

surfaces.name: repair_handoff
surfaces.primary_question: What bounded repair handoff is ready, blocked, or still review-only after diagnosis?
